YACHIYO_ANCIENT.title: Yachiyo
YACHIYO_ANCIENT.pages.INITIAL.descriptio: You step through the gate to Tsukuyomi, Yachiyo's silhouette flickering before you.
YACHIYO_ANCIENT.pages.DONE.description: Yachiyo happily takes your hand and leads you to the true Tsukuyomi.
YACHIYO_ANCIENT.pages.INITIAL.options.TS: Add a [gold]Starlit Sea[/gold] to your deck.
YACHIYO_ANCIENT.pages.INITIAL.options.KA: Add a [gold]I Love Myself![/gold] to your deck.
YACHIYO_ANCIENT.pages.INITIAL.options.TS: Add a [gold]Starlit Sea[/gold] to your deck.
YACHIYO_ANCIENT.pages.INITIAL.options.KA: Add a [gold]I Love Myself![/gold] to your deck.
I hope you have fun in Tsukuyomi~
YACHIYO_ANCIENT.talk.ANY.0-0r.ancient: Hey, are you setting off on another journey?
KAGUYA_ANCIENT.title: Kaguya
KAGUYA_ANCIENT.pages.INITIAL.description: A vibrant figure steps before you.
KAGUYA_ANCIENT.pages.DONE.description: Kaguya smiles and watches you leave, moonlight flooding the path home.
KAGUYA_ANCIENT.pages.INITIAL.options.HAP: Add a [gold]Happy Synthesizer[/gold] to your deck.
KAGUYA_ANCIENT.pages.INITIAL.options.PER: Add a [gold]World's Number One Princess[/gold] to your deck.
KAGUYA_ANCIENT.talk.firstVisitEver.0-0.a: KaguyaHo! Are you here to see my performance too?
KAGUYA_ANCIENT.talk.firstVisitEver.0-2.a: Oh my, what shall I do? If you can beat Iro P, I might just say yes?
KAGUYA_ANCIENT.talk.ANY.0-0r.ancient: You came to see my performance again!
SAKAYORI_IROHA_ANCIENT.title: Sakayori Iroha
SAKAYORI_IROHA_ANCIENT.pages.INITIAL.des: In the laboratory, Sakayori Iroha is intently adjusting some device. Sensing your arrival, she looks up, a glimmer of confusion in her eyes.
SAKAYORI_IROHA_ANCIENT.pages.DONE.descri: Iroha waves at you, then turns back to her research as the lab door slowly closes.
SAKAYORI_IROHA_ANCIENT.talk.firstVisitEv: (The woman before you seems shocked by your arrival.)
You might face some difficulties in the near future. I hope these can help you.
SAKAYORI_IROHA_ANCIENT.talk.ANY.0-0r.anc: Go and finish what you left undone.
BLACK_ONYX_ANCIENT.title: Black Onyx
BLACK_ONYX_ANCIENT.pages.INITIAL.descrip: Before you stand the top Tsukuyomi group.
BLACK_ONYX_ANCIENT.talk.SILENT.0-1.char: (mechanical voice) No, I am not Sakayori Iroha. Error.
BLACK_ONYX_ANCIENT.talk.SILENT.0-2.ancie: Long time no see. Want me to pat your head?
ROKA_AND_MAMI_ANCIENT.title: Roka & Mami
ROKA_AND_MAMI_ANCIENT.pages.INITIAL.desc: Roka and Mami stand side by side.
ROKA_AND_MAMI_ANCIENT.pages.DONE.descrip: Roka and Mami smile and wave goodbye.
ROKA_AND_MAMI_ANCIENT.talk.firstVisitEve: The two women before you seem surprised by your arrival.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.KAGUYA-SAKAYORI_IROHA: Girl who wanders between reality and virtuality, what do you seek?
… I’m waiting for a name to be called. Until it’s called, I won’t go anywhere.
You’re just afraid of ‘waiting and getting it wrong’.
You’re back. Time is like a corridor to you — you never finish it because you don’t want to.
The corridor is good. The end is not. The end means… no more waiting.
Foolish. If you never walk toward the end, you will always be just an echo.
Then stand there. The tower will remember for you: you came, many times, but took nothing.
If you truly want to save that girl, you shouldn’t stop here.
FUSHI_ANCIENT.title: Fushi
FUSHI_ANCIENT.pages.INITIAL.description: The scent of the deep sea permeates the air, an ancient figure standing silently.
FUSHI_ANCIENT.pages.DONE.description: Fushi's silhouette slowly fades, leaving behind a gift from the deep.
FUSHI_ANCIENT.talk.firstVisitEver.0-0.an: She has always believed in you...
FUSHI_ANCIENT.talk.ANY.0-0r.ancient: She has always believed in you...
